text: Great course first of all . One problem about the course is probably going to be the lectures . The lectures are explaining fundamental basics in Swift , which are really useful , but they are not comprehensive enough . So for most of the students , I believe , will have to do a lot of self - studying to finish the final project . But still , the final project is challenging and interesting . Swift is not a hard language to learn , so after went through all the lectures and read some books on Swift programming , I was able to finish the project .
